title: Intraday Order-Book Alpha Decay Half-Life Estimate
normalized_title: Intraday Order-Book Alpha Decay Half-Life Estimate
instruction: Context: an expert reviewer must convert noisy operational evidence into a defensible action plan for a constrained engineering window for intraday order-book alpha decay half-life estimate in the quant finance domain. Task packet: records: R1 horizon_ms=231 ic=0.005 cost_bps=0.283 net_edge_bps=0; R2 horizon_ms=62 ic=0.037 cost_bps=0.091 net_edge_bps=0; R3 horizon_ms=335 ic=0.023 cost_bps=0.168 net_edge_bps=0; R4 horizon_ms=503 ic=0.016 cost_bps=0.222 net_edge_bps=0; normalized_threshold_score=65.0; remediation_budget_usd=42500; options: O1 targets the horizon_ms driver and reduces normalized risk contribution by 12% cost=13175, O2 targets the ic driver and reduces normalized risk contribution by 18% cost=19975, O3 targets the net_edge_bps margin driver and improves normalized margin by 9% cost=22950;. Rules and constraints: priority = severity_weight*horizon_ms + recency_weight*ic + exposure_weight*cost_bps; choose actions under the embedded budget only; remediation options may be combined only if total cost<=remediation_budget_usd; expert-review flag is required when any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift; all calculations must use only the task packet. Required work: rebuild the decision logic, identify threshold crossings, test the sensitivity of the conclusion, and create the review-ready table. Deliver alpha_decay_notebook.ipynb + research_note.md with formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the task packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes where relevant, and a final decision table. Do not invent inputs, substitute outside data, or hide uncertainty; mark any unresolved ambiguity as needs_review. This task is self-contained: use the task packet as the factual record, do not add source references or external datasets, and preserve a high-fidelity audit trail for every calculation, classification, and recommendation. State assumptions and unresolved evidence gaps explicitly. When executed locally, place final deliverables under the artifacts/ directory.
